fault_hypothesis: The expiration check on line 73 uses a strict greater-than comparison (`>`), which incorrectly considers an entry valid when the current time is exactly equal to the deadline. The condition should be `now >= deadline` to correctly expire entries at their deadline boundary.

constraints.intent: The check at the deadline boundary is incorrect; time should not be exactly equal to the deadline.
A cached value should only be returned if the current time is strictly before its deadline.
The deadline stored in the cache record should not be exactly equal to the current time, which is the failing boundary condition.

spec.expr: ('deadline' not in locals()) or (__cbfl_result == default) or (now < deadline)

constraints.intent: A non-default value should only be returned if the deadline has not been reached, otherwise the default is expected.
